name: code-sentinal-extension
description: AI-powered real-time DSA mentor inside VS Code.

codesentinal.backendUrl.description: URL of the Code Sentinal FastAPI backend /analyze endpoint.

codesentinal.personality.description: Personality style for Code Sentinal messages.

codesentinal.difficulty.description: Difficulty level for questions and feedback.

codesentinal.analysisDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay (in ms) before sending code to backend after edits.

codesentinal.enableStatusBar.description: Show detected concept and complexity in the status bar.

codesentinal.quizCooldownSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between "Want to try a quiz?" prompts (cooldown).

codesentinal.periodicQuestionIntervalSec.description: How often (in seconds) to offer a new question when you're actively coding. Set high to reduce frequency.

codesentinal.idleThresholdSeconds.description: If no edit happened in this many seconds, you're considered idle and periodic questions are skipped.

commands.title: Code Sentinal: Analyze current file now
